feedback.text: Dont Kill Games Stand for Digital Fairness Games are more than entertainmenttheyre culture, connection, and creativity. The Digital Fairness Act should protect our digital rights, not erase them. Removing or banning games limits free expression, hurts developers, and punishes players. Fairness means access. Fairness means choice. Lets build a digital future that supports innovationnot one that shuts it down. Say no to unfair game bans. Say yes to digital freedom.
